Package dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.entity

package dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.entity
Single-table design entity support for DynamoDB Simplified.

Provides annotations (@Entity, @KeyComponent, @KeyPrefix, @Version) for declarative mapping of entity classes to composite key schemas.

EntitySchema reads @KeyComponent annotations from entity classes. EntityTable / AsyncEntityTable provide entity-aware CRUD operations that automatically compute composite key values and filter by discriminator.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified
    Core entry points and client-facing API for DynamoDB Simplified.
  • Class
    Description
    AsyncEntityTable<T>
    Async typed interface for single-table design operations on a DynamoDB table.
    AsyncEntityTableBuilder<T>
    Builder for creating AsyncEntityTable instances for single-table design.
    CrossEntityResult
    Groups items retrieved from a cross-entity query by their entity type.
    CrossEntityResultWithPagination
    Holds a single page of cross-entity query results along with pagination metadata.
    Entity
    Marks a class as an entity type for single-table DynamoDB designs.
    EntityQueryBuilder
    Builds and executes cross-entity queries across multiple entity types sharing a single DynamoDB table (single-table design).
    EntitySchema<T>
    Captures the schema metadata for an entity type used in single-table designs.
    EntitySchema.KeyComponentInfo
    Describes a single key component part with its attribute name, position, and a strategy for extracting the value from an entity instance.
    EntitySchemaReader
    Reads @Entity and @KeyComponent annotations from a class and produces an EntitySchema.
    EntityTable<T>
    Typed interface for single-table design operations on a DynamoDB table.
    EntityTableBuilder<T>
    Builder for creating EntityTable instances for single-table design.
    KeyComponent
    Marks a field or getter method as contributing to a composite key component.
    KeyPrefix
    Sets a static prefix for a composite key component.
    KeyPrefix.Container
    Container annotation for repeatable @KeyPrefix.
    Version
    Marks an attribute as the version field for optimistic locking.
